title: Conversation
description: Unified schema for ingesting conversations into ai-memory-hub.

id.description: Unique identifier for this conversation entry.

source.description: Origin of the conversation (chatgpt, copilot, claude, gemini, local-llm, mcp, manual, json-import, etc.).

timestamp.description: Timestamp representing when the conversation occurred or was captured.

title.description: Optional human-readable title for the conversation.

messages.description: Ordered list of messages in the conversation.

text.description: Raw message text. Must preserve emojis, code blocks, and formatting.

metadata.description: Additional metadata for ingestion, indexing, and retrieval.

imported_at.description: Timestamp when this entry was imported into the hub.

topics.description: Optional topics extracted or assigned by agents.

model.description: Model used to generate assistant messages (e.g., gpt-4.1, claude-3-opus).

platform.description: Platform where the conversation occurred (web, cli, vscode, desktop, api).

agent.description: Agent responsible for ingestion (mcp, langgraph, manual, local-llm).

ingestion_method.description: How the conversation was ingested (mcp, manual, json-import).

contains_code.description: Whether the conversation contains code blocks.
